sections.title: A Fine Haul Event – Harvest the Earth’s Bounty
sections.content:
__TABLE__
Gather | Rewards
90,000 Mana | Legendary Medal x1 7,500 Ore x8 3,000 Mana x8
300,000 Gold | 30-minute Research Speedup 10,000 Gold x8 10,000 Wood x8
300,000 Wood | 30-minute Research Speedup 7,500 Ore x8 3,000 Mana x8
200,000 Ore | Epic Hero Token 10,000 Gold x8 10,000 Wood x8
1,000,000 total resources | Gem x50 60-minute Research Speedup 10,000 Gold x8
